$comment: Canonical field dictionary for SSO calculation. Every company formula config (configs/<company>.json) and the Phase 2 LLM column mapper reference these `key` values. Hand-edit freely: add aliases_th variants as new companies are onboarded, fill in expected_group once verified against a real file. See .claude/skills/sso-calc/SKILL.md for the disambiguation rule this file exists to serve.

aliases_th: เงินเดือนต่องวด
เงินตกเบิกปรับเงินเดือนย้อนหลัง
fields.notes: Not present in Upload_Excel.xlsx sample file; sourced from company manuals. expected_group unverified — confirm group when a company file with this column is available.

aliases_th: ตกเบิกสวัสดิการ
fields.notes: Not present in Upload_Excel.xlsx sample file; sourced from company manuals. expected_group unverified — confirm group when a company file with this column is available.

aliases_th: ค่าครองชีพ
fields.notes: Not present in Upload_Excel.xlsx sample file; sourced from company manuals. expected_group unverified — confirm group when a company file with this column is available.

aliases_th: ชดเชยวันลา (บาท)
fields.expected_group: ชดเชยวันลา
fields.notes: Income-side leave compensation. Disambiguate from deduct_leave_compensation by expected_group ('ชดเชยวันลา') — the two share a near-identical Thai name but sit under different group headers.

aliases_th: หักลาไม่รับค่าจ้าง (บาท)
fields.expected_group: ลาไม่รับค่าจ้าง

aliases_th: หักมาสาย/กลับก่อน (บาท)
fields.expected_group: สาย/กลับก่อน

aliases_th: หักขาดงาน/ไม่ทาบบัตร (บาท)
fields.expected_group: ขาดงาน/ไม่ทาบบัตร

aliases_th: หักชดเชยวันลา (บาท)
fields.expected_group: ชดเชยวันลา (หัก)
fields.notes: Deduction-side leave compensation. expected_group is 'ชดเชยวันลา (หัก)', distinct from leave_compensation_income's 'ชดเชยวันลา' — the group is what disambiguates these two fields since the Thai names are otherwise nearly identical.

aliases_th: หักสวัสดิการ
fields.notes: Not present in Upload_Excel.xlsx sample file; sourced from company manuals. expected_group unverified — confirm group when a company file with this column is available.

aliases_th: เบิกเงินล่วงหน้า
ฐานเงินเดือน
fields.notes: Not in the original requested list — added because this is the literal SSO wage base column ('ฐาน' = base) and is very likely the direct source feeding the sample file's ground-truth 'BASE SSO' column.

aliases_th: หักพักเที่ยง (บาท)
fields.notes: Not in the original requested list — added because it follows the same pattern as deduct_late_early/deduct_absence: a monetary attendance-violation deduction that reduces the wage base.
